title: UKRail.mtr trains-addon
description: A Resource pack that adds Taichung Metro (TMRT), fictional JR-style obj trains and display scripts.
body:
![m-3 series (Based on JR-E233)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba378d2e6193a869cb38cfa56c2bebdae91df3d.jpeg)![Taichung Metro (mini) credit for using map as background: Wolv Haven City (New Haven)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c09ea5f03c9004857ddd86b4c27b1e9d208fa4fb.jpeg)
Credit for using map as background: Wolv Haven City (New Haven)

# Version 1.2 -
Resourcepack release of trains under works of "UKRail" for MTR mod. Read the following and enjoy!

## Precautions:
It is only tested on fabric version of MTR mod. It will might not work on forge versions.
You will need to download NTE version 0.5.0(or above) to work!
- You are free to repaint the trains and modify them without permission, but you need to contact me if you want to publish your remixes, or add remixes inside another resourcepack!
- Feel free to add it into your private server resourcepack.
- You may not use any files in this pack and claim it as your own.
- You may not publish this pack without modification.
- You may not copy the sound or script file into another pack (but using resource path to this pack is ok.)

## Trains included:

![Taichung metro train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d9900445be03bea5df98514c7ebd7c4fd77249d.jpeg)

Taichung MRT

Taichung MRT - Script version

Taichung MRT (mini)

Taichung MRT (mini) - Script version

![m-3 series (Based on JR-E233)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba378d2e6193a869cb38cfa56c2bebdae91df3d.jpeg)

m-3 series (Based on JR E233)

>   m-train door positions:
  
>   - "m-3" series 24-I type (24m)
>   - "m-3" series 19-I type (19m)

**ukmtr_fictional_custom_parts** 

additional parts/ png templates for repaint.

**Sounds:**

door opening/closing - mtr:tmrt_s

running sound - sp1900 (mtr)

**Display:**

standard mrt led display script - mtr:tmrt/display.js
